class src.osir_api.osir_api.api.model.OsirApiModuleModel.OsirModuleGroupModel(*, modules: list[str] = [], groups: dict[str, OsirModuleGroupModel] = {})[source]

Bases: BaseModel

find(*path: str) → OsirModuleGroupModel | None[source]

Navigates to a subgroup, e.g. find(“unix”, “live_response”).

classmethod from_paths(paths: list[str]) → OsirModuleGroupModel[source]

Builds the tree from the flat list of relative YAML paths returned by the IPC (FileManager.all_modules(relative=True)).

groups: dict[str, OsirModuleGroupModel]

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].
